skills.name: ocr-document-processor
skills.role: General scanned docs/images, tables, structured extraction.

skills.name: pdf-ocr-extractor
skills.role: Tesseract-based local OCR for scanned PDFs.

skills.name: pdf-ocr
skills.role: Dual OCR pipeline using local Python 3.12 venv and RapidOCR.

pipeline.detail: Dropbox archive, CAST BUILD A.O exports, and Telegram attachments are indexed locally.
4,674-file Alüm data room is grouped by section/category.
OCR pilot identifies PDFs with weak/no native text and extracts representative samples.
Document intelligence JSON feeds the CAST Build UI.

guardrails: OCR is assistive; verify anything affecting cost, scope, code, life safety, structure, permits, or schedule.
Prefer native CSV/PDF text exports over OCR when available.
Do not run low-trust drawing analysis against sensitive documents without human review.
